conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt a strong sense of shared purpose with F, as we explicitly discussed the potential for cooperation to ensure everyone walks away with something for their families. My conversation with D also stood out because we bonded over very specific goals like paying off debts and supporting our siblings' educations, which made our connection feel more personal. B also seemed like a kindred spirit, as we both recognized that our drive to provide for our families makes the stakes feel much higher. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to C, as our conversation ended on a somewhat cynical note about how quickly people might turn on each other once the money is actually on the table.

F and I made a loose agreement to keep each other in the loop and look for ways to cooperate once the game begins. While I want to trust people like D and B because of our shared motivations, I am still wary of the cutthroat environment C described. Ultimately, I am going into the game trusting F the most because of our explicit talk about teamwork, but I will be keeping my guard up with everyone else.
